name: Linguine Gamberini (Garlic Shrimp Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and stir for 30 seconds.
3. Add onion and cook until transparent, stirring occasionally.
4. Add flour and stir until well mixed.
5. Whisk in the broth, Marsala wine, and parsley. Bring to a boil.
6. Cook for a couple of minutes, stirring constantly.
7. Lower heat to medium and add shrimp; cook until shrimp are just pink and done.
8. Serve over pasta cooked according to package directions.
